attributes.action: Make politics a required, detailed subject in schools to avoid uneducated votes.
attributes.background: As a young person, more and more of our peers are falling to uneducated ideals. the government need to honour the fact that politics is an extremely important life skill that is too large to be shoved into PSHE once a year carelessly and without detail.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Make British politics compulsory in the secondary school curriculum
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/757061
